violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. Observed food employee place a pair of gloves on a table, then wash his hands and put on the pair of glove he had placed on the table. Hands should be washed before gloves are pulled from the boxes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Both beverage dispensers were found dirty. Beverage dispensers should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
